Both jobs were done to perfection so when I decided to have my roof completely replaced, I didn't look to anyone else.  Both John and his son Jason are both honest contractors and that is hard to find these days.  They have a great knowledgeable crew who work together like a well-oiled machine and my entire house roof and shed, plywood and all was done in one day and looks unbelievably great.  My neighbors are even complimenting the job.  If you need anything done with your roof, rafters or skylights this is the contractor you should hire.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp2-LXmAE&fid=0x0:0xd284e97d46ae60f2"],"When":"2023-8-29"},{"Name":"Norman Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLljrp6QIzB1UrwTXMFCr7X9lu9WJdMWV2BAmPa7bqkIneZIA4q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great experience with John Asch Contracting. I had a water leak around my chimney that made its way down to my dining room ceiling due to the amount of rainfall we'd received. Jason came out to assess the damage and explained the cause. The roof at the base of the chimney needed to be correctly flashed.

While I received several quotes from competitors, John Asch Contracting stood out because of their approach, honesty, and sincere concern for their customers. He was able to get his team out to repair the problem within a week, even though they were backlogged and more inclement weather was expected. The team showed up first thing Saturday AM and took the time to explain and address my concerns. They were very professional and completed the work just in time before the rain.

I highly recommend John Asch Contracting for any repairs, installation, or roof needs, but don't take my word; see all their reviews and testimonials. John Asch provides a short video of his service, what they do differently, and transparency about the industry. There's a reason why they have been in business for over 60 years: hard work, dedication, trust, and customer care.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICNnqyzHQ&fid=0x0:0xd284e97d46ae60f2"],"When":"2024-1-14"},{"Name":"Kevin Bloom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmwR4zsEhfxC8KhmBjjOBvTuxA6BQRBprtq3QC2ZLYz3OWsT-zfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After being discouraged by several astronomical estimates from "big" companies, we were amazed at John's honest pricing and 20 year "no leak" workmanship guarantee. John and his office staff were pleasant and easy to deal with. The day of the job was simply amazing! From tear down of 2-layers on my 47 year old house, through the install of the new roof, box vents (glad John recommended  these over ridge vents for attic ventilation) and chimney flashing right up to the "cleaner" who came by after all workers left to do a thorough final clean up and check for nails/debris on the entire property I couldn't have been happier. John must of called me four times during the job to personally check-in and his son came by several times to check-in with me and the foreman. I worked in retail for 10 years and John understands customer service. I recommend his company without hesitation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICU1qTD_QE&fid=0x0:0xd284e97d46ae60f2"],"When":"2019-7-3"},{"Name":"Alan Kane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYQAFFrbUadGbxmZAllv4lfi-vobW-cl89wKCt90zFhYC6USMqag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"John Asch just replaced my roof and I am pleased to recommend them to anyone, including friends and family.  Any roofer can put shingles on a roof. They are professionals who really know their business. It's their level of service and communication that made all the difference to me.  Two things about them stood out.  First, I was concerned about the risk of flat tires or injury to my dog from nails from the removed shingles.  They did an excellent cleanup, including using magnetic sweepers throughout the property.  Second, the roof exhaust fan they installed was defective.  When I called them, they responded immediately and came to replace it on the first day that it stopped raining.  This really demonstrated their commitment to customer service.  Five Stars!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Violet Rocha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLy8RBggymiXxZYp4S1Uba9UQ4VEdKFnV3bIQYlMFTXNBdIkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From start to finish, John and Jason from Asch Roofing delivered a flawless experience that exceeded every one of my expectations! I had been looking into different companies in my area to repair our roof, and one company quoted us $24,000. Then I turned to Asch Roofing who gave us a quote that was less than half of the other company’s quote. In addition to this amazing price for the repairs, Jason had explained everything about the process; it would be started and finished in one day and they would ensure everything was clean when they were done. Asch Roofing did what they said they would do- and even more! Asch Roofing returned the next day to double-check that everything was done properly and the area was all cleaned. Our roof was perfect and the customer service was excellent from start to finish. We would recommend Asch Roofing to anyone needing a great job done at an amazing price, and we cannot wait to work with them again!","Images":null,"When":""}]

After a long decision process, and with AJ's help, we selected the teak color (an excellent decision). Arriving home the second day was stunning.  The roof looks great, the workmanship was fantastic, and the clean-up was great and no damage.  During the two day process, AJ was in touch with me sending me progress pictures and status.
